reason: Share route and app-level client route implementation must follow web frontend conventions.
Chat utility action and share dialog/page UI changes must follow shared UI package conventions.
Share protocol, snapshot, crypto, and Nostr client helpers belong in the pi frontend package.
Feature spans UI, routing, protocol helpers, and runtime display data; use shared cross-layer and reuse guidance.
Search existing copy/export/session helpers before adding new snapshot utilities.
Ensure share snapshot format, encoded link format, route parsing, and UI rendering stay consistent across layers.
